title: PolicyDecision
description: Permission decision for one proposed mission action issued by the GAIL OS policy gate. Transport-neutral.

action_id.description: Action this decision applies to. Must use the 'action-' prefix.

cns_trace_id.description: Shared CNS trace thread when this decision is part of a persisted trace.

allowed.description: Whether the action is permitted under current policy.

mode.description: Execution mode permitted or rejected (dry-run or live).

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the allow/deny decision.

stop_reason.description: Stop trigger key if the action was denied. Null if allowed.
